satyavat a. Truthful, veracious.
— m. N. of a king, husband of Sāvitrī, q. v.
— tī
1 N of the daughter of a fisherman, who became mother of
(pb) Vyāsa by the sage Parāśara.
2 N. of the wife of  Nārada. 
3 Of the wife of Ṛcīka.
